arts.sum: The injury to Gabriel Jesus in Sunday’s FA Cup clash against Manchester United has only increased the talk over the club moving for attacking reinforcements before the end of the January transfer window. arts.sum: The Frenchman joined PSG from Eintracht Frankfurt in 2023 for £79million having scored 26 goals and assisted 17 in 50 matches. But he has struggled to kick on fo r the Ligue 1 champions.

arts.sum: If ever there was a game that showed Arsenal are in desperate need of a proven striker, then Sunday's FA Cup defeat against 10-men Manchester United was the perfect example.

arts.ttl: Tamworth star shares racist abuse sent to him after FA Cup loss to Tottenham
arts.sum: A Staffordshire Police spokesperson said: "We're aware of a social media message involving racist abuse that was sent online to a player following the FA Cup match between Tamworth and Tottenham Hotspur yesterday (Sunday 12 January). Tamworth player Chris Wreh has shared a screenshot of racist abuse he claims to have received after his team's FA Cup defeat to Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday, January 12.

arts.ttl: Bayindir shines as 10-man Man Utd beat Arsenal in Cup thriller
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir shines as a 10-man Manchester United beat Arsenal on penalties in an FA Cup thriller at Emirates Stadium.
